data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding invoice currency lock after confirmation.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Invoice currency lock after confirmation', but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or data confirming that the currency was locked post-confirmation. The prior steps focus on booking details where the currency is listed as USD, but there is no indication of a locked conversion rate or any mechanism ensuring the currency remains unchanged after confirmation. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure or success.
gaps: No evidence of currency lock mechanism or confirmation process.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the currency lock after confirmation.
